analysis.summary: Across this nets session, the strongest visual pattern is early commitment to scoring shots against fuller balls outside off.
video_observations: Estimated false-shot moments from roughly 24 balls.
Front-foot commitment likely begins too early on fuller seam deliveries.
Shot map should tighten for the first 12-18 balls of each practice block.
shot_selection_issues: Driving at balls that should be left or defended.
Expanding scoring intent before control is established.
technical_workons: Keep head quieter through release and delay hands until length is clearer.
Train straight-bat access first before cover-drive expansion.
recommended_drills: Decision drill: 24 balls, leave or defend only outside off until coach calls score ball.
Straight-bat corridor through the V with no hard hands.
mental_cues: Line first, then length, then shot.
If unsure early, default to leave or defend.
progress_markers: Reduce outside-off false shots by 30% across next 3 sessions.
Maintain high-control options for first 12 balls in every block.
analysis.next_version_note: This is an MVP scaffold. Real CV layers will later replace heuristic observations.
